Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.model

Interface IWord

All Known Implementing Classes:
WordModel
public interface IWord
Interface representing word management logic. Classes implementing this interface generate, validate, and load words.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    generateWord()
    Generates a new random word for the current level.
    void
    loadWords()
    Loads the words for the current level from the corresponding file.
    void
    setLevel(int level)
    Sets the current level and reloads words accordingly.
    Boolean
    validateWord(String word)
    Validates if the given word matches the current word.

  • Method Details

    • generateWord

      String generateWord()
      Generates a new random word for the current level.
      Returns:
      generated word

    • validateWord

      Boolean validateWord(String word)
      Validates if the given word matches the current word.
      Parameters:
      word - user input word
      Returns:
      true if the word is correct, false otherwise

    • setLevel

      void setLevel(int level)
      Sets the current level and reloads words accordingly.
      Parameters:
      level - new level

    • loadWords

      void loadWords()
      Loads the words for the current level from the corresponding file.
